model.label: GPT-5.4
model.description: OpenAI • Frontier GPT model for general-purpose reasoning, tool use, and agentic workflows.

pick.rationale: Arizona is the overwhelming pick because the team-quality gap is massive in every predictive measure: the Wildcats are No. 3 nationally in both KenPom and Torvik, while LIU sits outside the top 200 with a below-average offense. The betting market also reflects that mismatch, with Arizona listed around a 31.5-point favorite. LIU’s only realistic path is an extreme shooting-variance game combined with Arizona being limited by health, but even with recent concern around Koa Peat, the overall talent and efficiency edge still make Arizona the clear advance choice.

reasoningStep.title: Arizona vs LIU evaluation
reasoningStep.summary: Arizona’s elite two-way profile, LIU’s weak underlying efficiency numbers, and the market spread all point to a highly lopsided 1-vs-16 matchup. I checked recent injury context for Arizona, and nothing available was strong enough to justify fading the Wildcats.
evidence: Arizona is No. 3 in both KenPom and Torvik, with elite efficiency on both ends of the floor.
LIU ranks outside the top 200 in both systems and has a particularly weak offensive profile.
Arizona was listed around a 31.5-point favorite in published matchup previews.
Recent ESPN reporting noted Koa Peat had a lower-body injury, but no fetched update indicated a tournament absence significant enough to change the pick.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

result.text: Arizona vs Long Island picks, predictions, odds for NCAA March Madness Skip to main content Home NFL NBA NHL MLB WNBA Outdoors BetFTW Casinos Newsletter Pop Culture College Football Men's College Basketball Women's College Basketball MotorSports Golf USA TODAY Sports Arizona vs Long Island picks, predictions, odds for March Madness game Jeremy Cluff Arizona Republic Show Caption Hide Caption March Madness Final Four predictions and national champion picks From chalk favorites to hot upsets, the panel shares Final Four picks and bold calls on who cuts down the nets. No. 1 seed Arizona and No. 16 seed Long Island play Friday, March 20, in a March Madness NCAA Tournament first-round game . The West Region game is scheduled for 10:35 a.m. MST and can be seen on TNT ( stream with FUBO ). ( Stream with Sling TV. ) Who will win the March Madness game and advance to the second round in the NCAA Tournament bracket ? Check out these March Madness picks and March Madness predictions for the men's college basketball NCAA Tournament matchup . Arizona is a 31.5-point favorite over Long Island in the game in March Madness odds provided by BetMGM Sportsbook . The Wildcats are -10000 on the moneyline. The Sharks are +3300. The over/under for the game is set at 150.5 points. March Madness picks: Ohio State-TCU | Nebraska-Troy | Louisville-South Florida | Wisconsin-High Point | Duke-Siena | Vanderbilt-McNeese | Michigan State-North Dakota State | Arkansas-Hawaii | North Carolina-VCU | Saint Mary's-Texas A&M | Illinois-Penn | Georgia-Saint Louis | Gonzaga-Kennesaw State | Houston-Idaho | Kentucky-Santa Clara | Texas Tech-Akron | Arizona-Long Island | Virginia-Wright State | Iowa State-Tennessee State | Alabama-Hofstra | Villanova-Utah State | Clemson-Iowa | St. John's-UNI | UCLA-UCF | Purdue-Queens | Kansas-Cal Baptist | UConn-Furman | Miami-Missouri | The Republic's score predictions Watch Arizona vs Long Island on Sling The Arizona Republic : Arizona 92, Long Island 60 Jeremy Cluff writes: "Yes, Arizona has had its share of early-round NCAA Tournament disappointments. This Wildcats team seems poised for a very long run, however." March Madness picks: Predictions for NCAA Tournament first-round games Dimers : Arizona 92, Long Island 62 It writes: "After extensive simulations, our model gives LIU a win probability of 1%, while Arizona has a win probability of 99%." Join the madness: USA TODAY Bracket Challenge | Survivor Pool | Printable bracket ESPN : Arizona has a 99% chance to beat Long Island The site gives the Sharks a 1% shot at defeating the Wildcats in the NCAA Tournament March Madness first-round game. Bookies.com : Bet Arizona to cover vs Long Island Bill Speros writes: "The Wildcats clawed their way to the Big 12 title, own a 9-game winning streak, and finished 32-2 against ranked teams. The 'Cats went 20-12-1 ATS. They want to stake their claim as the Best Team In The Land. Thanks for coming, LIU." March Madness odds: Ohio State-TCU | Nebraska-Troy | Lou

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

Current game label: West 1/16
Round: Round of 64

Prior committed picks: 12
